chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-77 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on MA 6982/23 3.For hearing of main case 11-12-2023 Mr. Aamir Abro, Advocate for applicant. Private respondents are present in person. ***** Applicant seeks transfer of Sessions Case No.105 of 2022 (re: State-Versus Zahid Raza Shah & others), arising out of Crime No.13 of 2022, registered at P.S, Tharushah, under sections 324 PPC etc. from the Court of learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Naushhro Feroze to any other Court on the ground that presiding officer is interested. He has relations with the accused party and is pressurizing the applicant to compromise with the accused. However, no such proof has been filed. On the contrary, respondents, who are present in person, submit that entire case has proceeded and is fixed for final arguments. In view of above, this Transfer Application is dismissed. However, trial Court is directed to decide the case on merits in accordance with law. JUDGE Ahmad
